forms.title: Authorization to Pick-Up Form
forms.description: This form does not take the place of your student's emergency contact form. It is to be used as a form to allow an authorized individual to pick your student up from Desert Garden for a during a specific period of time.

fields.label: Parent Home
fields.notes: Original label ambiguous; assumed to be home phone. Confirm with DGM.

sections.section_helper_text: Identification MUST be provided upon pick-up.

fields.label: Address
fields.notes: Consider long_text if full street/city/state/zip needed

sections.section_helper_text: I understand that once my child has been released to the above authorized individual, Desert Garden Montessori is no longer responsible. By typing my name below, I agree to conduct business with Desert Garden Montessori by electronic means. I intend, by typing my name below, to "sign" the preceding document and to be bound by its terms and conditions.

forms.title: Campout Participation and Excursion Form for LE
forms.description: This form is to allow my student to participate in the LE Campout excursions and activities at Tonto Rim Christian Camp. I understand that every effort will be made to contact me in the event of an emergency. In the case of a medical emergency, I hereby authorize Desert Garden Montessori School to transport my child to the nearest hospital and/or medical treatment facility to secure the necessary medical treatment. I understand there will be staff traveling with my child who are current in their certification for basic first aid and CPR, and authorize them to give my child first aid where/when appropriate.
forms.form_notes: Trip dates (April 8th-10th) are hardcoded in a question label, meaning the form needs updating each year. Consider making the date a configurable/template variable in MyGrowthSuite.

fields.label: My student has permission to travel with DGM adult chaperones to Tonto Rim Christian Camp from April 8th-10th and participate in campout related activities and excursions.

sections.section_helper_text: By typing my name below I agree to conduct business with Desert Garden Montessori by electronic means. I intend by typing my name below to "sign" the preceding document and to be bound by its terms and conditions.

forms.title: MYHS - Consent for OTC Medication Administration Form
forms.description: Over-the-Counter (OTC) medication are drugs that do not require a prescription and are purchased "over-the-counter." This form is required before over-the-counter medication can be administered at school.
description_bullets: All Non-prescription over the counter (OTC) medications will be dispensed as needed to students upon the completion of the Consent for OTC Medication Administration form with parent/guardian signature. Medication will be given in accordance with package directions. Dosage must be weight and age appropriate per label (i.e. children specific formula).

If medication is to be administered for three (3) consecutive days, a licensed healthcare provider order must be submitted to the school health office for continuing administration of the medication beyond the three (3) days to ensure that use of this medication is not masking symptoms of a serious condition in the student.
In order to minimize the possibility of a drug overdose, non-prescribed medications will not be dispensed during the first and last hours of the school day.
This form is to be filled out optionally for students that may be taking overnight fieldtrips with DGM.
forms.form_notes: Two typos in source: 'Anti Naseau' should be 'Anti Nausea'; 'Hydrocortison Cream' should be 'Hydrocortisone Cream'. Recommend fixing on rebuild.

fields.label: Please select each medication you are giving permission to administer:
fields.notes: Checkbox grid: parent selects Yes or No for each medication. If MyGrowthSuite doesn't support grids natively, implement as 10 separate Yes/No radio questions or a multi-select 'check all you approve' with the medication list.

fields.label: Is your student allergic to any medication?
fields.notes: Recommend converting to Yes/No radio with conditional text field for the follow-up. Currently a free-text answer expected.

fields.label: If yes, please list medicine(s) and type of reaction.
fields.notes: Conditional on previous answer being Yes

fields.label: Does your student take any medication (either over-the-counter or prescription) on a regular basis?
If yes, please list.
fields.notes: Conditional on previous answer being Yes

forms.title: Cafe Worker Permission Form
forms.description: Dear Parents, Your child has applied and been hired to work at the Desert Garden Cafe. This will require supporting your child with transportation as needed. Working at the cafe is a valuable training experience on work ethic for the future. Please sign below to allow your child to participate in this life skill activity. NOTE: Students will be receiving a share of the overall tips collected periodically. By typing my name below I agree to conduct business with Desert Garden Montessori by electronic means. I intend by typing my name below to "sign" the preceding document and to be bound by its terms and conditions.

forms.title: Childcare Registration Form
forms.status: PARTIAL - description only; fields not accessible (form closed to responses at time of capture)
forms.description: Childcare Days are days the School is open but there is no class instruction. Childcare is made available to assist working parents. These dates are all listed on the DGM App 'HOLIDAYS AND IN-SERVICE CALENDAR' icon. Please fill out the form below for any childcare dates that you are interested in. It is imperative that you register your child/children (this includes Extended Day children) if you wish to have your child receive care. If you are not registered, we cannot extend childcare services to you since we base our staffing needs on the number of children who are registered. If you do not register your child during the registration period and miss the deadline; you may contact the front desk to add your child to the waitlist. On the Childcare Day, you may call the school at 9:00am to see if we can accommodate your child for that day. NOTE: Extended tuition rates include Childcare Days. All other tuition rates do not include Childcare Days and will be billed as follows: Half Day students: A flat rate of $67.00 per child; School Day Children: $120 per child. Please see the Parent Handbook under Financial Terms and Conditions. Hours of operation for ALL Childcare Days: 7:00am-4:00pm. No-show fee equals the daily flat rate; cancellations must be made up to 2 school days prior via email or written notice to the front desk. Please provide a non-perishable, nut free sack lunch at drop-off; organic kitchen is closed on Childcare Days. Arrive no later than 9:00am. Send cancellations to Ms. Lisa. No electronics allowed; devices will be confiscated.
forms.form_notes: Form was closed when captured. Fields need to be obtained via reopening, screenshot, or response spreadsheet headers. Recommend splitting policy text into a separate 'Childcare Policies' page in MyGrowthSuite (too dense for an inline form description).

forms.title: Fall Enrichments
forms.status: PARTIAL - description only; fields not accessible (form closed to responses at time of capture)
forms.description: Dear DGM Parents, Enrichments are back! Listed below are the classes that are being offered this semester. All classes are held right here on the DGM campus! (Please be aware of the required age group for each class when signing up.) All classes are scheduled to begin the week of Monday, September 8, 2025. The last day to sign up is Tuesday, September 2, 2025. All Classes will be 12 weeks long, with the exception of Friday Elementary classes which are 9 weeks long and the Chess Club which is 6 weeks long. The end date of classes offered may vary by class due to scheduled childcare, early releases, and holidays. Enrollments after the published start date will only be granted until the end of the first week of classes. All class schedules are final after this date. If the minimum number of students is not met the class will be cancelled. Any make-up classes due to provider absence are the responsibility of the Enrichment Provider. Administrative staff will contact parents regarding the scheduling of any necessary make-up sessions. All fees are managed by Desert Garden Montessori. A staff member will be present at all times. Classes will NOT be held on the following days: October 6-10 Fall Break; October 13 Conferences; November 11 Veteran's Day; November 26-28 Thanksgiving Break; Early Release Fridays (Elementary only): October 3, November 7, December. Please contact the Front Desk if you have any questions or concerns. ***All associated fees will be collected via your FACTS account. If you need to make other payment arrangements please contact DGM Finance at finance@desertgardenmontessori.org.
forms.form_notes: Seasonal/cyclical form. Recommend MyGrowthSuite template with configurable variables for: semester name, start week, signup deadline, class length defaults, no-class dates. Fields need to be obtained via reopening, screenshot, or response spreadsheet headers.

forms.title: Mosquito Repellent Permission Form
forms.description: Dear Parent/Guardian, To help protect students from mosquito bites during outdoor activities, Desert Garden Montessori will be applying a non-toxic, DEET-free mosquito repellent spray that is free of common allergens. This product (California Baby - Natural bug repellent) is safe for children 6 months and older. Please complete the form below to permit the DGM staff to apply mosquito repellent to your child as needed. If you have any questions or concerns about the mosquito repellent or its ingredients, please contact support@desertgardenmontessori.org. Thank you for helping us keep our students safe and comfortable during outdoor time!

fields.label: Classroom
fields.notes: Currently only lists Primary classrooms; may need expansion if used schoolwide

fields.label: Parent/Guardian Consent
options: I GIVE PERMISSION for staff to apply the non-toxic, allergen-free mosquito spray to my child as needed during outdoor activities.
I DO NOT GIVE PERMISSION for staff to apply mosquito spray to my child. I understand that my child may be more exposed to mosquito bites while outdoors.

forms.title: Request For Administering Medication Form
forms.description: This form is to allow the front desk or field trip chaperone to administer medication as described below. Prescription medication must be in the original container as dispensed by the pharmacist. The label must include the student's name, name of medication, dosage and have current date. Over-the-counter or non-prescription medications must be in the original packaging with all directions, dosages, contents, and proportions clearly indicated. Please provide a doctor's note with instructions and dosage. All medications, including refills, must be brought to school by the parents and left with authorized school personnel. Students are not to have medications in pockets, lunch boxes or backpacks at school.
forms.form_notes: DGM-internal counterpart to the AZDHS State Medication Consent Form. Some fields overlap; consider whether MyGrowthSuite should merge them or keep parallel for compliance.

fields.label: Child's Classroom
fields.notes: Full DGM classroom list - use as master reference for other forms

fields.label: Dosage
fields.notes: Helper text: 'Please specify the amount of medication to be given.'

fields.label: Please list all/any possible side effects.
If you answered "Other" in the question above, please explain the time and frequency needed for the administration of this medication.

forms.title: Spartan Registration Form
forms.description: The Spartan Race is a series of obstacle races of varying distance and difficulty ranging from the half mile to marathon distances. As a classic obstacle course racing experience, the race combines relatively easy trail running with a series of obstacles, held on off-road terrain featuring water and mud. Climb walls, crawl under wire, monkey bars, aim a spear throw, and more! This form is to register for the Spartan Race. All associated race fees will be collected via your FACTS account. By submitting this form you are allowing Desert Garden Montessori Finance Team to charge your FACTS account with the pricing indicated below. Race fees will be billed to your FACTS account. If you have an alumni student and do not have a FACTS account, you may pay by cash or check at the front desk. The fee for DGM alumni and non-DGM siblings of current students will be $250. Winter Sport - Spartan: Coed Primary, Elementary, & MYHS (Ages 5+); Season Dec 1-Feb 11; Cost $220 per athlete (includes registration, Mud Monster gear, training); Spartan Trial during school day Nov 17th for 3rd Primary, Elementary and MYHS; Practice ONLY Mondays in December, M/W in Jan-Feb (Primary 2:30-3:10pm, LE 3:15-4pm, UE & MYHS 4-5pm) at DGM; Pre-Race Parent Meeting Feb 11th 5pm; Race Date Feb 15th, Location TBD. Contact Coach Bala at athletics@desertgardenmontessori.org.

fee.payment_method: FACTS account (or cash/check at front desk for alumni without FACTS)
fee.inclusions: Registration fee, Mud Monster gear, training

forms.form_notes: Most detailed athletics form - captures parent contact info and pricing tier. Could serve as master athletics template. Note: no parent signature/e-sig field in this form despite collecting payment authorization - flag for DGM.

forms.title: Arizona State Emergency, Information and Immunization Record Card
forms.source: PDF (Arizona Department of Health Services - Bureau of Child Care Licensing)
forms.description: Arizona Department of Health Services Bureau of Child Care Licensing - Emergency, Information and Immunization Record Card. State-required for childcare-licensed facilities. Pursuant to R9-5-304.B, at least two contact persons are required.
forms.form_notes: State-mandated form for licensed childcare. Has paper-specific elements (CDC/SGH#, staff-only fields, dated update tracking) that may not fit a digital parent portal. Recommend digitizing only the parent-facing portion and keeping immunization record as a file upload. PDF attachment of immunization record or exemption affidavit is required.

sections.section_helper_text: I authorize the following individuals to collect my child from the facility in case of emergency or if I cannot be contacted. Pursuant to R9-5-304.B, at least two contact persons are required.

fields.label: Health Care Provider Name
fields.notes: Helper text: 'A Health Care Provider is a physician, physician assistant or registered nurse practitioner.'

fields.label: Health Care Provider Contact Telephone Number
In case of injury or sudden illness, I request that this individual be called first
The following individual(s) may NOT remove my child from the facility - Name(s)
Custody papers have been provided and are on file at the facility

sections.section_helper_text: I hereby give authority to any hospital or doctor to render immediate aid as might be required at the time for his/her health and safety.

A licensee shall attach an enrolled child's written immunization record or exemption affidavit to the enrolled child's Emergency, Information and Immunization Record card. For information regarding current immunization requirements go to: www.azdhs.gov/phs/immun/index.htm or contact the Arizona Immunization Program Office at (602)364-3630.

forms.title: Summer Registration - Elementary 2026
forms.description: Summer registration form for Elementary students. Weekly summer rate of $400 INCLUDES organic lunch, prorated for Juneteenth and July 4th holidays. Brochure (referenced in form) details summer plans.

weekly_elementary.notes: Prorated for Juneteenth and July 4th holidays. Extended Day pricing available at request.

fee.policy: Summer tuition is NON-REFUNDABLE and DUE IN FULL on May 1st. NO REFUNDS WILL BE ISSUED FOR ABSENCES OR WITHDRAWALS AFTER MAY 1st.

forms.form_notes: Companion form to ITP Summer Registration. PDF export shows question labels but NOT options for: Summer Daily Schedule, Summer Lunch Selection, Summer Lunch Restrictions, Allergies. Need DGM to provide. Two source typos: 'preceeding' should be 'preceding'; 'ABSENSES' should be 'ABSENCES'. Recommend merging logic with ITP Summer form under a single 'Summer Registration' template parameterized by program level (Infant/Toddler/Primary/Elementary) - they share most fields and only differ on rate structure and program-specific options.

sections.section_helper_text: Elementary Summer is HERE! Please check out the brochure included for the amazing summer plans we have for our Elementary students! The weekly summer rate is only $400 INCLUDING ORGANIC LUNCH (prorated for the Juneteenth and July 4th holidays).
Please select the desired daily schedule for the summer program. Extended Day pricing is available at request!

fields.label: Summer Daily Schedule
fields.notes: Options not visible in PDF - likely School Day, Extended Day (no Half Day for Elementary)

sections.section_title: Summer Organic Lunch - Elementary Lunch Selection
sections.section_helper_text: Please select the desired lunch option for the summer program. Organic Lunch is INCLUDED in the weekly summer rate!

fields.label: Summer Lunch Selection
fields.notes: Options not visible in PDF - need DGM to provide

sections.section_helper_text: Please indicate if your child has any lunch restrictions

fields.label: Summer Lunch Restrictions
fields.notes: Options not visible in PDF - need DGM to provide

fields.label: Summer Billing acknowledgment
fields.notes: Display text: 'Summer tuition will be billed through FACTS based on your selections herein. Summer tuition is NON-REFUNDABLE and DUE IN FULL on May 1st. NO REFUNDS WILL BE ISSUED FOR ABSENCES OR WITHDRAWALS AFTER MAY 1st.' Source typo: 'ABSENSES' should be 'ABSENCES'.

sections.section_helper_text: I have read and understand the preceding document and I intend by typing my name here to "sign" the preceding document and to be bound by its terms and conditions.
